message:
fix(components): harden command palette, carousel a11y, date formatting, and keyboard shortcuts

command-palette.tsx:
- Add hasFetchedThisOpenCycleRef to ensure the search index is fetched at most
  once per open/close cycle instead of re-fetching on every render while open
- Rename the 'force' option to 'bypassErrorGate' for self-documenting intent
- Remove the artificial cap of 15 projects in the command list so all projects
  are searchable
- Add explicit default case to the switch statement (lint compliance)
- Change the footer shortcut hint from "? All shortcuts" to "ESC Close" which
  more accurately describes what the displayed key actually does

endorsement-showcase.tsx:
- Replace global window keydown listener with a scoped React onKeyDown handler
  bound to the carousel container elements, preventing the arrow-key handler
  from firing when the carousel is not focused
- Guard arrow-key navigation on itemCount > 1 to avoid no-op transitions
- Remove the unused useEffect import

hero.tsx:
- Extract handlePrimaryCtaClick callback that spawns particles at the actual
  click coordinates, falling back to the button center when clientX/clientY
  are both 0 (keyboard activation), fixing misplaced particle bursts on
  keyboard-triggered link clicks

markdown-renderer.tsx:
- Widen the language-class regex from /language-(\w+)/ to
  /language-([A-Za-z0-9_+#-]+)/ so that language names containing +, #, or -
  (e.g., c++, c#, objective-c) are matched correctly for syntax highlighting

nvidia-podcast-section.tsx:
- Replace inline new Date().toLocaleDateString() with a dedicated
  formatPodcastDate utility that explicitly parses ISO-8601 date-only strings
  via Date.UTC, eliminating timezone-induced off-by-one-day display bugs
- Add null guard (nvidiaStoryData.podcasts ?? []) so destructuring never throws
  if the podcasts array is absent
- Wrap the featured podcast card in a conditional render to avoid rendering
  undefined when the array is empty

site-header.tsx:
- Replace the string-typed metaKey state ("Cmd"/"Ctrl+") with a semantic
  shortcutModifier state typed as "Cmd" | "Ctrl", deriving the display glyph
  and aria-label from it so the aria-label correctly reflects the platform
  modifier key instead of always saying "Cmd+K"

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
